zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Norwich於大約1298年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可梅廷加姆時，她的父親Walter Norwich25歲，母親Catherine de Hethersett25歲。她於1327年11月13日與Robert de Ufford I在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1375年9月3日在英國英格蘭素福爾可瑟斯頓享年78歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可坎普 艾什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Norwich于大约1298年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可梅廷加姆时，她的父亲Walter Norwich25岁，母亲Catherine de Hethersett25岁。她于1327年11月13日与Robert de Ufford I在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1375年9月3日在英国英格兰素福爾可瑟斯頓享年78岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可坎普 艾什。

nameMeanings.name: Norwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): habitational name from the city of Norwich in Norfolk. The placename derives from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wīc ‘specialized or outlying farm’.

variants.name: Northridge
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Norridge in Upton Scudamore (Wiltshire) or from a similarly named but unidentified places elsewhere. The placename derives from Middle English north ‘north’ + rigge ‘ridge’ (Old English north, hrycg). There may have been some confusion with Norwich .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Norwich was born about 1298, in Mettingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Norwich, was 25 and her mother, Catherine de Hethersett, was 25. She married Robert de Ufford I on 13 November 1327, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 September 1375, in Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Campsey Ash, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Norwich est née environ 1298, à Mettingham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Norwich, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Hethersett, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Ufford I le 13 novembre 1327, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1375, à Thurston, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Campsey Ash, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Norwich um 1298 in Mettingham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Norwich 25 und ihre Mutter Catherine de Hethersett 25. Sie hat am 13. November 1327 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Robert de Ufford I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1375 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Thurston, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Campsey Ash, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Norwich è nata il circa 1298 nel Mettingham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Walter Norwich, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Catherine de Hethersett, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Ufford I il 13 novembre 1327, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1375, nel Thurston, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Campsey Ash, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Norwichが約1298年にイギリスイギリススフォルクメッティンガムで生まれた時，父Walter Norwichは25歳，母Catherine de Hethersettは25歳であった。1327年11月13日にイギリスイギリススフォルクでRobert de Ufford Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1375年9月3日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスウルストンで78歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクカンプセイ アッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Norwich(이)가 대략 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멧틴그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Norwich(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de Hethersett(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1327년 11월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Robert de Ufford I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 9월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스르스턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 캠프시 애시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Norwich nasceu aproximadamente 1298, em Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Norwich, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Hethersett, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Ufford I em 13 de novembro de 1327, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1375, em Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Campsey Ash, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Norwich родилась около 1298 г. в местности меттингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter Norwich было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Hethersett, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Ufford I 13 ноября 1327 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 сентября 1375 г. в местности турстон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности кампси аш, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Norwich nació aproximadamente 1298, en Mettingham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Norwich, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Catherine de Hethersett, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Robert de Ufford I el 13 de noviembre de 1327, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1375, en Thurston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Campsey Ash, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
